channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Car illegally parking… again!, 17th May
item.description:
The vehicle GD24BSX parks on the Village Green daily - it’s a shared communal space. Not a car park! The vehicle belongs to 296 Hurst Road as they often have several vehicles and vans all parked on the grass ruining the communal green I’d like to remind the council the tenancy of a COUNCIL HOUSE permits 1 vehicle per driveway, not 7-11 cars, vans and motorbikes!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 397, Hurst Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sunken pavement on Rotherhithe street., 17th May
item.description:
The paving blocks are always sinking/falling into a void below the pavement. It has been a recurring problem for a few years. It seems like there is a bigger issue going on below the pavement around the drain cover.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 366-376, Rotherhithe Street, Rotherhithe, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime hire bikes Parked dangerously, 17th May
item.description:
Lime hire bikes Parked dangerously and blocking of the walk way for pedestrians on Swiss court TWG Tea.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whitcomb Street, Covent Garden, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sort this out now! This is a home not a dumping ground, 17th May
item.description:
Sort this out… tens and tens of bikes ruining the road. Your business does not work take it elsewhere you littering and road blocking gits

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 36, Charlotte Road, Shoreditch, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Playground in need of maintenance, 17th May
item.description:
The playground needs maintenance. Sport's area needs cleaning from litter and foliage. Play area needs resurfacing and broken equipment needs fixing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bladindon Drive, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeding needed along bottom of the wall on Sandy Hill Road, 17th May
item.description:
Some rubbish is compiling amongst these weeds, so it would be good if they could be removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crescent Road, Woolwich

item.title: Some camping immediately next to the highway, 17th May
item.description:
It is dangerous for both the person camping and road users. As well as being antisocial as camping with no facilities next to private houses and the highway. In this case a very busy road - Hayes Lane.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayes Lane, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
